data.name: Femdom Girlfriend 2: Victoria Loves Teasing Me With Her Boobs
data.detailed_description:
After your brutal session with Selene, Sophie shows you mercy by letting you sleep in her bed instead of your cage to let you rest up for Victoria's upcoming session. Victoria, your sadistic childhood friend can either be the gentlest, kindest, nicest, most compassionate out of your bullies, or the most unhinged and brutal depending on her mood. Luckily for you, it seems like Victoria is in a good mood, and her method of using you as her stress relief toy involves using her boobs to mercilessly tease and bully you.

  • ~5K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 16 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Victoria, your sadistic childhood friend, loves bullying you with her boobs, and today your girlfriend has sent you to be bullied by her for the whole day
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
